findings.problem: Source-first verification coverage is still partial because the board-only parameter-store load test and no-motion smoke remain blocked, so this rerun cannot claim complete/exhaustive implementation closure under `verify-sequence/default`.
findings.evidence: The repaired probe surface now emits `element_evidence.records.count` and flattened `element_evidence.records[index].*` facts in `new/user/scene_overlay_probe.cpp:417-517`, and the residual guard at `new/verification/tests/run_bev_simple_residual_check.sh:217-219` enforces that surface. However, `openspec/changes/establish-bev-element-raster-pipeline/verification/board-smoke-blocker.json:1-38` still records the unresolved board-access failure for task 5.8 (`run_param_store_load_runtime_parameters_board_test.sh`) and task 5.11 (board no-motion smoke).
findings.recommendation: Keep the probe repair, then restore board reachability or attach serial to WSL and rerun the blocked board-only checks before requesting implementation closure.
